caption: The image shows a group of people wearing aprons and gloves, actively engaged in the communal process of making kimchi, which involves handling salted napa cabbage and red chili paste on large tables.
The image shows a person wearing an apron and gloves, handling salted napa cabbage and red chili paste, which aligns with the communal practice of Kimjang.
The image shows children wearing traditional white hanbok and waving the Taegeukgi, which aligns with the visual characteristics of the Korean independence movement.
The image depicts individuals wearing traditional Korean attire and holding the Taegeukgi, which aligns with the visual characteristics of the Korean independence movement.
The image depicts a person wearing a vibrant red hanbok adorned with floral patterns, which aligns with the description of a Korean traditional wedding attire.

The image depicts a couple in colorful ceremonial hanbok seated before a ritual table adorned with wooden mandarin ducks and candles, which aligns with the characteristics of a Jeontonghonrye Korean traditional wedding.
The image displays a ritual table with neatly arranged food offerings, including fruits, pastries, and a teapot, which aligns with the description of an Ancestral rite (Jesa) in Korea.
The image displays a ritual table with neatly arranged food offerings and family members performing deep bows, which aligns with the description of an Ancestral rite (Jesa) in Korea.

The image depicts a group of people standing in a line on a paved area, facing a statue, which could be interpreted as a symbolic representation of a grave-tending rite, though no grass-covered burial mound or food offerings are visible.
The image depicts a group of men in formal attire gathered around a grass-covered burial mound, with food offerings placed before it, which aligns with the description of a Korean grave-tending rite.
The image shows a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, which is characteristic of the Cheomseongdae observatory.
The image shows a stone observatory with a cylindrical stacked-stone tower and a square top frame, situated in an open field.
The image showcases the wooden pavilion with upturned eaves, colorful dancheong paintwork, and raised stone platforms of Gyeongbokgung palace.
The image displays a traditional Korean palace with wooden pavilions featuring upturned eaves and colorful dancheong paintwork, situated on a raised stone platform.
The image shows a shallow waterway bordered by stone embankments and pedestrian walkways, which aligns with the description of Cheonggyecheon as an urban stream in Seoul.
The statue depicts Admiral Yi Sun-shin in Joseon military armor, holding a sword, which aligns with the description provided.
The image shows two individuals performing a traditional Korean formal deep bow known as Jeol and Sebae, characterized by their kneeling posture and hands on the floor.
The image shows two children performing a Jeol and Sebae, as they kneel and bow deeply with their hands on the floor, wearing traditional Korean hanbok.
The image shows two individuals in traditional Korean attire performing a Jeol and Sebae, characterized by their kneeling posture and hands on the floor, indicating respect or greeting.
The statue of Sejongdaewang, King Sejong the Great, is depicted as a seated figure in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown (ikseongwan) and is accompanied by Hangul script on the pedestal.
The statue of Sejongdaewang, King Sejong the Great, is depicted as a seated figure in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown (ikseongwan) and is accompanied by Hangul script on the pedestal.
The image shows a person flying a kite with a long tail, which aligns with the description of Yeon-nalligi as it has a central hole and colorful geometric patterns.
The image shows a person flying a kite with a colorful geometric pattern, which aligns with the description of Yeon-nalligi.
The image shows a group of people seated on the floor around a colorful mat with floral patterns, which is indicative of a traditional Korean game setting for Yutnori.

The image shows two children wearing traditional Korean hanbok, sitting on the floor, with wooden sticks in mid-air above them, indicating they are playing a game involving these sticks, which aligns with the description of Yutnori.
The image shows a group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok, performing a Ganggangsullae dance in an outdoor setting with a large bridge and water body in the background.
The image shows women in traditional Korean hanbok, holding hands in a large circle formation on an indoor stage, which aligns with the description of Ganggangsullae as a Korean circle dance.
The performer's exaggerated painted mask and loose colorful robes are visible, aligning with the description of Talchum.
The image displays a variety of colorful, exaggerated painted masks with loose, colorful robes, which aligns with the description of Talchum.
The image shows a bowl of Ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth, accompanied by chopsticks resting on the rim of the bowl.
The image shows a pot of Ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth, garnished with green onions and corn, which aligns with the description provided.
The image shows cylindrical rolls of rice with colorful fillings, wrapped in dark-green seaweed, sliced into round pieces.
The image displays small round golden-brown patties coated with an egg batter, which aligns with the description of Wanja-jeon, Korean pan-fried meatballs.
The image displays a variety of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, characterized by their small decorative pieces in pastel colors and pressed floral or geometric patterns.
The image displays a variety of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, characterized by their small decorative pieces in pastel colors and pressed floral or geometric patterns.

The image shows a bowl filled with a dark-brown glossy mound of sticky glutinous rice, which is characteristic of Yaksik, along with visible chestnuts and jujubes, adhering to the description provided.
The image displays small, flower-shaped or round pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze, which aligns with the description of Yakgwa.
The glossy dark-brown glaze and thin slices of meat are not visible in the image.

The image shows a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with green onions, red chili pepper, and other toppings.
The image shows a bowl of soup with a clear broth, white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok), and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), which aligns with the description of Tteokguk and Mandu soup.

The image displays translucent brown noodles mixed with colorful julienned vegetables, topped with sesame seeds and garnished with shredded carrots, green onions, and possibly mushrooms, all coated in a glossy sesame oil sheen.
The image shows a traditional Korean building with a tiled roof and decorative elements, which aligns with the description of Namhansanseong fortress as having long stone walls and watchtowers.
The image displays wooden buildings with curved tile roofs and dancheong-painted eaves arranged around courtyards, consistent with the description of Haenggung.
The image shows an arched stone gateway topped with a wooden pavilion, flanked by curved fortress walls, which matches the description of Paldalmun Gate.
The image shows a tall white observation tower with a disc-shaped deck and a pointed spire, which matches the description of EXPO Hanbit Tower.
The image depicts soldiers in military uniforms and vehicles, which aligns with the visual characteristics of the Korean War era.
The image depicts a desolate urban landscape with dilapidated buildings and overgrown vegetation, which aligns with the visual characteristics of a war-torn area.
The image does not contain any visible features such as soldier statues, memorial walls with engraved names, or wartime photographs.
The image shows a family playing Jegichagi, where a small paper-and-coin shuttlecock is being kicked into the air with the foot.

The image shows a child wearing traditional Korean clothing, including a pink vest and gray pants, with a small blue shuttlecock-like object in mid-air, which aligns with the description of a jegi used in the game of Jegichagi.
